hcfdade38g0ee2g4f2dg9465gf785f3b2fde3: Peace. Enjoy it while it lasts.
h4b5502a0g7f17g41d6gbe47g6bdb0bda6515: The tieflings are grateful for your efforts, as well should they be.
h82c03b7dgfff7g46bdga086g5e8ebf7c2d7b: Master Halsin would approve. I pray he still returns, Silvanus willing.
h81ce96d0g4f21g438dg8e72g035e5b5b442b: Finally, we'll be rid of the outlanders' infernal stench.
h551c00b3gd4deg4594g98d4gfde4dc59229a: The last prayer will be spoken and the rite will conclude. When the coming army swarms, the brambles will keep us safe.
h9e687061g991dg4f4dgb790gc151a6faf349: I suppose you want thanks. I'm sure the tieflings have plenty.
h34dab272g1933g4757g8a03gb14ad4e937ad: I've discovered the truth. You're allied with Shadow Druids.
h38aa0d75g07d1g4ec0gbdcbgc8a422c1af56: Have you now? And you thought you should tell me?
h834d5416g65c4g4169g88f5g651f71f14f4d: We will execute the Rite of Thorns, and you will give no more complaint. In fact...
h2d48ef4cgdca1g4b3bga89dg07065af25acb: ... you will be gone before the sun next sets on the grove.
h14adf1b9gfe32g475dgbc49gc6e4ecdb9d2a: We're grateful for your efforts - though none more than the refugees.
ha0815e36gffebg448aga0c1gf50b1d28b5fa: There is cause for celebration. Master Halsin would approve of this.
h13daf7adg5275g4f25g8c42ge0bbed24bf82: He's... he's really gone then. That means...
h16004969gbca4g45efg8f7agf34ac9aec025: Treefather, make us tall as the ash and stout as the spruce. I...
hb5f19d7cgaff8g4d0bgb420g9a9f6615505a: Oh, Hells - the prayer can wait. I'm... I'm going to miss him.
h521d3c65g2525g43b5g85a3gfa227cc3d3e0: Halsin is dead. I thought you should know.
h635ffcfegb034g43e0g8172gfd144a11f2f0: He turned his back on the Circle to stumble after the past. How fitting that it's consumed him.
hb90570dbg7c50g4cbcg8de6ga98a1c24f5cc: Well. A broodmother looks forward, never back. I am First Druid now. And I will keep my children safe.
he0bc80f5g40a6g4eaegbbe3gff9b0d69b878: There is cause for celebration. Master Halsin would approve.
hca5d56c6g1f52g43dfg825eg0321f1eb15f6: The grove is forever in your debt. Walk freely among us, for as long as the sun sets and rises.
